TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Alan Alda, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga qutux Amirika msulung stzwyaw qani. hiya ga maki hopa pqwasan biru cbaqan sinsiy. qyanux na sraral Alan Alda minkahul the Bronx, New York City na Amirika. Robert Alda, hiya' ga yaba' ni Alan Alda, hiya ga m'engi. pinqbaqan nya Alan Alda, t'aring kawas tay 1956 tehuk kawas tay 1960, mqwas biru sa Fordham pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Arlene Weiss uzi mqwas biru sa Fordham pqwsan biru krahu. Alan Alda maki tay kawas 1961 msqun ki Arlene Weiss, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1955, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. magan tzyu Emmy Award ru Golden Globe Awards blaq balay. 2004 kawas hiya ga magan lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alan al*a, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa qutux amirika ms~ɕuluŋ s~ɕtzwjaw qani. ħija ɣa maki ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕins~ɕij. qjanux na s~ɕraral alan al*a minkaħul tħe βronx, new jork ʦ~ʨitj na amirika. roβert al*a, ħijaʔ ɣa jaβaʔ ni alan al*a, ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. pinqβaqan nja alan al*a, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *or*ħam pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja arlene weis~ɕs~ɕ uzi mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *or*ħam pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. alan al*a maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki arlene weis~ɕs~ɕ, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alan al*a ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. maɣan tzju emmj awar* ru ɣol*en ɣloβe awar*s~ɕ βlaq βalaj. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa maɣan lalu nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Alan Alda, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga qutux Amirika msulung stzwyaw qani. hiya ga maki hopa pqwasan biru cbaqan sinsiy. qyanux na sraral Alan Alda minkahul the Bronx, New York City na Amirika. Robert Alda, hiya' ga yaba' ni Alan Alda, hiya ga m'engi. pinqbaqan nya Alan Alda, t'aring kawas tay 1956 tehuk kawas tay 1960, mqwas biru sa Fordham pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Arlene Weiss uzi mqwas biru sa Fordham pqwsan biru krahu. Alan Alda maki tay kawas 1961 msqun ki Arlene Weiss, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1955, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. magan tzyu Emmy Award ru Golden Globe Awards blaq balay. 2004 kawas hiya ga magan lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alan al*a, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa qutux amirika ms~ɕuluŋ s~ɕtzwjaw qani. ħija ɣa maki ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕins~ɕij. qjanux na s~ɕraral alan al*a minkaħul tħe βronx, new jork ʦ~ʨitj na amirika. roβert al*a, ħijaʔ ɣa jaβaʔ ni alan al*a, ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. pinqβaqan nja alan al*a, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *or*ħam pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja arlene weis~ɕs~ɕ uzi mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *or*ħam pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. alan al*a maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki arlene weis~ɕs~ɕ, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alan al*a ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. maɣan tzju emmj awar* ru ɣol*en ɣloβe awar*s~ɕ βlaq βalaj. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa maɣan lalu nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
